items.name: Black Belted Bow Heels (Peony Doll)
items.description:
Made to fit peony doll bundle: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/448195/Peony-Doll

Crafted from luxurious crocodile skin, these statement heels feature satin straps that delicately wrap like belts, adorned with charming bows. Perfect for adding a touch of avant-garde sophistication to any look.
